automationRules.title: Road Test Completed
automationRules.desc: Mark repair order closed, email digital safety inspection chart, trigger final invoice.

automationRules.title: Parts Delay Escalation
automationRules.desc: If replacement alternator delay exceeds 2 hours, notify customer and offer discount.

aiSuggestions.title: Bay Allocation Blockage

aiSuggestions.title: Upcoming Service Prediction
aiSuggestions.message: Alice's vehicle is due for a 6-month oil check. Send pre-booking offer link.
